title: Baby Kitty And Friends
description: Play as cute animals inspired by Sanrio!
body:
# Summary
 
Drawing inspiration from the timeless charm and spirit of Sanrio’s iconic style, step into your favorite block game where you can become cute and loveable animals!
 
### Does this change any mobs or textures? 
This project does not replace anything in the Minecraft environment aside from YOU, the player.
 
This is only for Java edition.
 
### Supported modpacks? 
Can be used in my [Project 4J](https://modrinth.com/modpack/project-4j) modpack which is also pretty cool!😉 
 
## How do I use this skinpack??? 

<details>
<summary>Tutorial:</summary>

 
## DOWNLOAD THE FOLLOWING MOD(s):

[Customizable Player Models](https://modrinth.com/plugin/custom-player-models) (neo/fabric)

AND

[Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) AND [Legacy Skins](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy-skins) mod

_Once installed..._

1.) Drop the .zip downloaded in \resourcepacks

2.) Launch your game-client.

3.) Goto Help & Options, Settings, Graphics.

4.) Scroll to the bottom of the menu.

5.) Open resourcepack adder screen on preferred assort or make your own. Include the Skin Pack RP.

Tip: Assorts are a bundle of RPs that holds your hand-picked RPs. Allows you to interchange bundled themes without removing RPs, say you want a Default themed and a Beta themed.. you can interchange between both without having to constantly remove RPs from a list.

</details>


 
This project is for educational, commentary, and/or transformative purposes and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with Sanrio. Any copyrighted material used in this project is utilized under Section 107 of the U.S. Copyright Act under the principles of fair use.
